title: HPOM-011: local_runner.py — scoped Ollama invocation wrapper
description: Create scripts/local_runner.py: a CLI wrapper for running Ollama models on scoped tasks. Pre-checks model health (local_assistant_health.py), runs the model with a prompt file or inline prompt, writes output to a named artifact file, creates a helper note in inbox/helpers/, and appends a HELPER_INVOKED event. Must enforce: model must be in REQUIRED_MODELS list, output must be written to an explicit --output path, helper note must record task_id/model/scope/input/output.
acceptance_criteria: script fails if requested model is not in the required models list
output is written to the --output path, not only stdout
a helper note is created in inbox/helpers/ with task_id, model, scope, output_path
a HELPER_INVOKED event is appended to events.jsonl
objective: Wrap Ollama invocations so every local model run has a scope record, output artifact, and event log entry. Enforce that only approved models can be used.
forbidden_changes: Do not modify local_assistant_health.py or claims.py; do not register Ollama models as core agents; do not use --yes-always or headless invocation
risk: LOW — new script; no existing logic modified
